name: tasktime
description: TaskTime Pro is a free, open-source, local-first work manager for freelancers, covering tasks, timers, expenses, invoices, and reports. Core use requires no TaskTime account or cloud sync, works offline after the PWA is loaded or installed, and stores work records in the browser. This first-party TaskTime Pro skill lets same-device agents operate the app through scoped access and approval controls.

interface.shortDescription: Manage TaskTime Pro projects, tasks, timers, expenses, invoices, quotes, and reports with agent help.
interface.longDescription: TaskTime Pro is a free, open-source, local-first work manager for freelancers, covering tasks, timers, expenses, invoices, and reports. Core use requires no TaskTime account or cloud sync, works offline after the PWA is loaded or installed, and stores work records in the browser. This first-party TaskTime Pro skill lets same-device agents operate the app through scoped access and approval controls.
defaultPrompt: Set up TaskTime Pro agent access.
List my TaskTime Pro projects and active timers.
Draft an invoice from unbilled TaskTime Pro work.
